signals.headline: Lakers Win Game 1 of Playoff Series vs Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Win Game 1 of Playoff Series vs Rockets | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets in Game 1 of their first-round 2026 NBA playoff series on April 20, as confirmed by multiple reports, with role players like LeBron James, Luke Kennard, Marcus Smart, Rui Hachimura, and Deandre Ayton stepping up despite injuries to Luka Doncic (hamstring) and Austin Reaves
